name: Five Iron Golf
about: Five Iron Golf Shelby Township is an indoor golf simulator venue that combines high-tech golf simulation with a sports bar atmosphere. The facility uses Trackman launch monitor technology for accurate swing data and virtual play on over 200 courses, including PGA Tour venues like Pebble Beach. It offers a mix of simulator rentals, golf instruction, club fitting services, and event hosting for various group sizes. The venue is designed to be accessible for golfers of all skill levels with a no-dress-code policy and features additional entertainment options including multisports simulators and shuffleboard.
why_golfers_like_it: Premium Trackman technology provides detailed swing analytics and course simulation
Full-service bar and kitchen on-site for convenient food and beverage service
Multiple entertainment options including golf, multisports simulators, and shuffleboard
Flexible booking options for both casual play and structured leagues
Professional coaching and custom club fitting available on-site
Spacious, open layout suitable for various group sizes and events

food_and_drink.notes: Full kitchen with chef-inspired menu from Detroit Taco Company available on-site
Fully-stocked bar with signature cocktails, local brews on tap, and canned classics

simulator_hardware.notes: Dual-radar Trackman technology in simulator bays with high-speed swing cameras

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Club rentals are available on-site. You can also bring your own clubs, with storage options provided.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted. The venue offers a full kitchen with food options and a fully-stocked bar.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: A typical 18-hole round takes approximately 2-3 hours depending on the course and player speed.

faq.question: Is this venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the venue hosts kids' parties and offers junior clinics. The multisport simulators and open layout make it suitable for families with children.
